programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: A man (Johnny Cash) dressed as a cleric and his wife (June Carter Cash) claim to be on a mission of mercy.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Nellie feigns injury after an argument with Laura, then tries to manipulate others.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: After having her horse shod for the annual race, Laura learns that the Olesons have purchased an expensive racehorse for Nellie.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Carrie falls into a deep mine while chasing a butterfly; a drunken former miner must get his act together to rescue her.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: After witnessing a loud argument, Laura is under the impression that Mr. Oleson kills his wife, but no one believes her.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Charles rushes back to Wisconsin after he learns his mother has died, and his father is suicidal with grief.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Charles' father stays with the Ingalls, but an incident with Laura deepens his depression.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Laura struggles to understand why the rest of her family does not like her goat, which she saves from farmer Parson's shotgun.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Charles tries to tolerate three bullies, until they assault his family.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Laura asks help from a blind recluse (Burl Ives) and his trapper son (Johnny Crawford) when Charles has a hunting accident.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: The community's children are trapped by a sudden snowstorm while on their way home from school. With Michael Landon and Karen Grassle.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Mr. Edwards' adopted son John decides to refuse a college scholarship when Mary agrees to get married to him.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: When Mr. Edwards takes his deathly ill daughter to a mountain cabin to nurse her, Laura tries to help.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Mrs. Oleson casts Nellie as the lead in the children's play; a girl plots marriage for her widowed mother.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: The Ingalls try to help a boy who is rejected by the townsfolk because his father is an Indian warrior.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney helps his young friends find good ways to express and deal with angry emotions.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Every day with Barney is fun—but today is extra special. It's Barney's birthday!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney, BJ and the kids spend the day preparing for a performance for their friends in the park.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The children work together to make a bird house. They are happy to learn that the bird will have lots of company; many animals make their homes in the park too!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop's friend Monty the butterfly passes through the park with a flock of friends on their way to Mexico. When Monty gets left behind by his insect friends and family, Barney takes everyone on a visit to Mexico.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney's excited to find out that Rusty's family is adopting a new baby girl from China; however, Rusty feels differently. He's not sure if he's going to be a good brother, and he doesn't know much about China.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: When Ben arrives too late to get a pony ride he must learn how to wait the hard way. He's always wanted a horse and now it looks as if he's missed his opportunity. Luckily, Barney takes him to Spain where they meet Regalo, a dancing horse!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Emma can't play with her friends because she has to complete a school project about her family. Before you know it, Barney brings Emma on a trip to Venice to learn more about her great granddad.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney, Baby Bop and BJ are helping the park kids get ready for a school play. When Barney tells everyone that putting on shows began in Greece, they want to go visit! While there, they meet some friends and decide to put on a play in an amphitheatre.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The kids are having a yard sale, getting rid of old toys, books and clothes. Kioko shows up holding a prized possession—a music box from Switzerland. By accident, Ben includes the music box in a cardboard box of yard sale items!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: When the kids find a mysterious, colorful egg in the park, Barney takes them on a trip to Kenya to try to find out what kind of animal could have laid the egg.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney takes the kids to Hawaii on a quest for a bird of paradise. While there, they meet some friends, learn new Hawaiian words, make a Hawaiian lei and dance a hula! Eventually, Barney and his friends find a bird of paradise.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Emma wants to paint an award-winning painting for the "Art In The Park Show," but she is just isn't satisfied with her artwork. Barney takes her to France to learn how to paint from his friend Pierre.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: It's Earth Day, a great time for everyone to learn how to help take car of our world, but Ben is wasting paper while BJ isn't too concerned about cutting down a tree to make room for a new playground.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Kami, one of Barney's youngest friends, has trouble keeping up with the other kids and she's tired of always being last. She's not having a very good day.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: When Tony brings his kite to the park to show his friends, it accidentally blows into the branches of a tree! While waiting for a breeze to blow the kite down, Barney, Baby Bop and the kids play games about "up" and "down."

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: A tea party planned by the children turns into a fun opportunity to reinforce lessons about good manners! Throughout the day, Baby Bop is given helpful advice.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney and the kids help Mr. Boyd prepare his dog Bingo for a trip to the veterinarian for a check, while learning lessons about caring for dogs at the same time. Meanwhile, BJ is searching for his missing baseball, which he suspects was buried by Bingo.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: A day of imaginative play and fun for Barney and his young friends is kicked off by the arrival of a variety of boxes from the "Enjoy-Your-Toys Company." Surprisingly, every box is empty!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: After playing with "Stop" and "Go" signs with Angela, Baby Bop leaves to direct some traffic of her own! Meanwhile, in the caboose, Barney and the kids enjoy a costume parade, a game of "Musical Stop & Go," and some very vigorous body movement.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The kids have put together a "Caboose Color Collection" which showcases the primary colors—red, yellow and blue. Barney and Baby Bop enjoy songs and games suggested by the colorful objects.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The children are surprised to learn that playing games and having fun in the park is great exercise. Baby Bop is happy to learn that not only is she exercising while she plays, but exercise will make her grow big and strong.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney and the kids are excited because five of Mr. Boyd's brass-playing buddies are putting on a show in the park tonight! Angela is learning to play the trumpet and knows that it takes a lot of practice. BJ arrives and the group visits the caboose.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: While Barney has fun with his friends every day, there's something special about making a brand NEW friend! When Mr. Boyd's niece, Colleen visits the park, she's eager to make friends with the other kids...but being the "new kid" isn't easy.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Tony shares a box full of numbers that he made with his dad. He is showing them off when a gust of wind blows them all away. Barney and the kids decide to go on a number hunt. They soon find Baby Bop and their hunt takes the group all over the park.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Angela is in the park to release her turtle after observing him with her classmates in school. Barney and the children discuss the meaning of in and out after observing the turtle going in and out of his shell.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: It's a rainy spring day, and the children can be found inside painting and creating. Barney arrives, explains the differences amongst the seasons, and suggests playing outside in the rain. The rain is soon replaced by sunshine and a rainbow.

programme.title: Music Talks: Queen Latifah
programme.desc: Music industry titan Andre Harrell sits down with the legendary Queen Latifah for an inside look at her journey through the avenues of the entertainment industry.

programme.title: Prince: Purple Reign
programme.desc: In recent times, music lovers have been confounded with the tragic and shocking news that some of their most beloved stars had passed away in controversial circumstances.

programme.title: Johnny Mathis: In Concert
programme.desc: Johnny Mathis is one of a handful of artists who truly deserves a legendary status. Since his impact on scene in the 1950s, Johnny has maintained a high levels of performance, both on recordings and on stage.

programme.title: Janet Jackson: In Control
programme.desc: She may have been the youngest of 10 of the Jackson children, but that did not stop Janet Jackson from embracing her own identity. Her unquestioned talent has built an empire of success as Ms. Janet remains In Control.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Wiz Khalifa
programme.desc: Music superstar Wiz Khalifa gives Larry a lesson in hip-hop culture and shares his excitement over soon becoming a dad. Plus, the tattooed rapper offers Larry some pointers on getting inked.

programme.title: Larry King Now: T.I.
programme.desc: Rapper, author and entrepreneur T.I. stops to by to discuss his highly-anticipated new album, Troubleman, his time in prison, and whether the free agent will sign with a new record label. Plus, T.I. offers his stance on gun control and pot legalization.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Snoop Lion
programme.desc: Larry sits down with Snoop Lion to talk about his new name, look, and faith. Plus, Snoop opens up about why he went from being a gun-toting rapper to spreading messages of non-violence in his new reggae song, "No Guns Allowed."

programme.title: Larry King Now: 50 Cent
programme.desc: You know him as a millionaire mogul at the top of his rap game. In this candid interview, 50 Cent sheds his public image to talk about growing up without a father, what he seeks in a partner & why the media doesn’t know who he really is.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Floyd Mayweather
programme.desc: The world's best pound for pound fighter Floyd 'Money' Mayweather sits down with Larry and talks about his upcoming fight on May 4th, his first since being released from prison this past year.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Oprah Winfrey
programme.desc: Larry sits down with media mogul Oprah Winfrey to talk about her personal experiences with racism, the future of the Oprah Winfrey Network, and her new role in the civil rights film, Lee Daniels' The Butler.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Forest Whitaker and Lee Daniels
programme.desc: Academy Award-winner Forest Whitaker opens up about his personal brushes with racism, and why he had to audition for 'The Butler.' Plus, the film's director, Lee Daniels, on his most significant work yet.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Wendy Williams
programme.desc: The always candid Wendy Williams opens up about her rising career in daytime talk. She shares her colorful personality, views on the power of pop culture in everyday life, and her new auto-biography.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Mike Tyson and Evander Holyfield
programme.desc: Larry gets an earful from Iron Mike Tyson and Evander 'The Real Deal' Holyfield on their infamous 1997 bout, the current state of boxing and their new mission to feed the hungry with Yank Barry, the Founder of Global Village Champions.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Terrence Howard
programme.desc: Uncensored and candid, Terrence Howard tackles everything from his ideal woman to Oprah to his (necessary) arrogance. Plus, he reveals the role he really wanted in The Butler, and why it’s hard out there for a pim-- er, Oscar nominee.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Terry Crews
programme.desc: The actor and ex-athlete is all candor as he discusses his awe over the Golden Globes win, how he saved his marriage, and why this man calls himself a feminist. Plus, Larry gets a pec pop tutorial.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Charlamagne Tha God
programme.desc: Charlamagne Tha God dishes on his current relationships with former foe Kanye West and mentor Wendy Williams, his bold style of broadcasting, and why he'll support Hillary in 2016.

programme.title: Jay-Z: Ultimate Hustle
programme.desc: It was hardly predictable when the boy from the Brooklyn projects became the world's first billionaire hip-hop star, Jay-Z. He turned his pain into passion and used the suffering to influence the words and lyrics in his music.

programme.title: James Brown: The Man, The Music & The Message
programme.desc: James Brown: The Man, The Music & The Message is an inspiring and entertaining program about the remarkable life of \\"The Godfather Soul\\" that features his greatest hits including "Living in America" and "I Feel Good."

programme.title: Darryl Jones: In The Blood
programme.desc: Follows the evolution of Jones, who grew up on the South Side of Chicago.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja

programme.title: Live: BIRDEMIC
programme.desc: Birdemic is one of our favorite bad movies of all time, and there's no better way to watch it than RiffTrax Live. So grab a coat hanger, fire up your solar powered TV and for the love of god fully vest your stock options! Birdemic!

programme.title: RiffTrax Live: Sharknado

programme.title: RiffTrax Live: Sharknado 2

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una fractura de muñeca se convierte en un misterio médico; dos pescadores quedan atrapados en el mismo señuelo; una animadora con un dedo torcido casi muere por una causa inesperada.

programme.desc: A routine mission to save an endangered planet brings Data face-to-face with a woman who claims to be his mother.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Returning to the Enterprise from a competition, Worf finds reality changing, and is troubled when no one else seems to notice.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Riker is torn when his former commander, now an admiral, orders him to hide the real purpose of a risky mission from Picard.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Killing for sport becomes Seven's only means of survival when she is abducted into a ring of fisticuffs.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Seven becomes a mentor to five young drones abandoned by the Collective.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The Voyager crew makes first contact with a holodeck program.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Claiming to be a long-dead crewmember, an alien requests asylum on Voyager.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The Voyager crew must rescue a young boy being used as a weapon of destruction against the Borg

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Janeway must tend to her flock when she finds three misfit crewmembers need some special attention.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Impostors jeopardize Voyager's good reputation in the Delta Quadrant.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Stranded during an away mission, B'Elanna finds herself the inspiration for a young poet's art.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: An old friend returns with a decidedly unfriendly plot to destroy Voyager.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The Doctor seizes an opportunity to save the life of the man who created him.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Neelix recounts the harrowing tale of Voyager's newest uninvited guest.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Captain Janeway faces her biggest battle yet against the Borg—assimilation.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Seven's long-lost love lures Janeway into a deadly encounter with the Borg Queen.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A malfunction in Seven's cortical node threatens to destroy her.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: With memories erased and identities changed, SG-1 find themselves trapped below a domed city on a planet of ice, toiling as slave laborers. Can they come to their senses and make a break for the surface, or will they remain enslaved underground?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When a quirky conspiracy theorist contacts SG-1 claiming to know classified information about the Stargate, at first they think he's bluffing. But when they investigate his wild claims, they realize he's a lot closer to the truth than they thought.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Teyla begins to see apparitions of ancients in distress and believes they are the ghosts of the Ancients recently massacred by the Replicators. McKay believes he's found the whale that saved him a year ago while trapped in a submerged puddle jumper.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The team hear of a great warrior with stories of defeating both the Genii and Wraith and seek him out in hopes of making a new ally. But when they learn this great warrior is none other than Lucius they believe he's up to his old tricks again.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Trying to preserve power by turning off all the non-essential systems the Ancients recently activated before being killed by the replicators, McKay mistakenly is hit by an energy beam from a mysterious device.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Lorne discovers a planet with dozens of satellites in orbit. However, inhabitants on this planet are no further advanced than the renaissance and have a flag with McKay's face. The team realize a game they had found earlier might be more than a game.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Investigating an abandoned space station, McKay mistakenly brings one of its scientists out of stasis. The scientist explains to the team that the base was the last effort by his people to avoid the repeated culling they've endured by the Wraith.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: With the entire city ordered to take a personal day the team does their best to unwind and enjoy their leisure time. Without warning a mysterious explosion rips through the city killing and injuring unsuspecting citizens.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The team searches the ocean for a mobile geothermal drilling station the ancients left dormant. Cautiously exploring the station, Teyla thinks she senses the presence of a Wraith. Weir, believing it's pressure affecting Teyla, has the team press on.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: After helping relocate the Taranans, the Atlantis team realizes they haven't heard from the village in a long period of time. It appears the Taranans have just abandoned their village until McKay detects life signs well beneath the surface.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: When Destiny’s attempt to recharge in a star is foiled by attacking drones, Eli suggests a risky plan to recharge in a super-hot blue giant…a star so hot it could destroy the ship…unless someone stays aboard and keeps the ship under manual control.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: After a battle, Destiny’s only option for survival is a jump to the next galaxy. Crew members return to Earth to say what may be their final farewells before embarking on their journey. But a risky stop may put the entire plan in jeopardy.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: When a military research base is attacked, a small group of civilians and military personnel escape on a ship into deep space. But divisions emerge between those who want to attempt a return to Earth and those who want to remain aboard the Destiny.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: After secretly contacting Homeworld Command, Dr. Rush (Robert Carlyle) claims that he has been placed in charge by Gen. O’Neill (Richard Dean Anderson) and that there is no hope of returning to Earth. But his assertions are soon questioned.

programme.desc: Vito Genovese and Carlo Gambino finally make their move. When Genovese becomes a liability, Luciano must choose an heir to lead the mob.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: Capone gets a taste of the underworld in Brooklyn with Johnny Torrio. Reuniting in Chicago, they start bootlegging and anger local Irish gangsters.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: A new mayor forces Torrio and Capone outside Chicago to nearby Cicero. There, Capone's brother Frank fixes an election, placing himself in jeopardy.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: A betrayal destroys peace in Chicago, and Torrio and Capone seek revenge against the Irish gangs. The "Beer Wars" make Capone Chicago's top gangster.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Madeline: Madeline on Stage
programme.desc: When Miss Clavel brings in a method acting teacher to direct the girls in a play, Madeline is sure she will get the leading role.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Madeline: Madeline on Safari
programme.desc: Nicole is embarrassed when she is asked to read a letter from her aunt, and it is revealed that her reading skills aren't as developed as the other girls.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Madeline: Madeline and the Fashion Show
programme.desc: When Madeline and the girls are given the opportunity to be high fashion models and meet the top designer Mme. Cliche, they are asked to wear creations made of cheese.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Madeline: Madeline at the Hotel Riche
programme.desc: When the pipes burst and the old house is closed for a plumbing overhaul, Madeline and the girls move into Lord Cucuface's lavish suite at the Ritz.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Madeline: Madeline's Halloween
programme.desc: When Madeline and the girls go to New York to meet their culturally diverse penpals and celebrate Halloween, Madeline finds some mysterious spider earrings in her trick or treat bag.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Madeline: Madeline at the Eiffel Tower
programme.desc: After Madeline performs a successful science experiment dropping an egg off the balcony of the old house without breaking it, Pepito dares her to drop her egg off the top of the Eiffel Tow

programme.title: The New Adventures of Madeline: Madeline at Versailles
programme.desc: While touring Versailles with Miss Clavel and the girls, Pepito disobeys a Do Not Touch sign, and leaves fingerprints of mud and chocolate on a priceless harpsichord.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Madeline: Madeline's Manners
programme.desc: After Pepito burps at the dinner table, his parents insist on sending him to etiquette school, where he is joined by Madeline and the girls.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Madeline: Madeline and the New Girl
programme.desc: A new girl from India is greeted with suspicion and distrust after the girls overhear that she's an alien, and then keep catching her in the attic with weird devices and antenna.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Madeline: Madeline and the Perfume Factory
programme.desc: While touring Lord Cucuface's perfume factory in Grasse, Pepito finds a friendly skunk, which he sneaks into the factory.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Madeline: Madeline at the North Pole

programme.title: The New Adventures of Madeline: Madeline and Santa
programme.desc: After Santa indulges in too many delicious holiday treats, he finds that his bulging tummy prevents him from fitting into the chimneys of the world.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Madeline: Madeline and the Dog Who Cried Wolf
programme.desc: When Genevieve wakes up with a strange rash, Dr. Fleabag the vet prescribes lots of loving care, which Genevieve enjoy so much that she begins to fake ailments.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Madeline: Madeline and the Magic Show
programme.desc: After Pepito and the girls go to see Harry Houdini's show, Pepito decides to create his own magic show at home, and puts poor Genevieve in danger.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Madeline: Madeline and the Giants
programme.desc: When Madeline and the girls go to Dr. Cohn for a physical, all the girls have grown several inches except Madeline, who has a dream that she will be Tom Thumbsized for her whole life.

programme.desc: The girls enter a cancan competition, but the intense practice schedule and concerns about costumes creates a problem: cliques.

programme.title: La patrona

programme.title: La patrona

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family

programme.title: The Addams Family

programme.title: The Addams Family

programme.title: The Brady Bunch

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: The kids give Alice the cold shoulder after they think she has broken their trust, so Alice decides to leave her job as housekeeper. However, the kids soon regret the decision after the new housekeeper teaches them a lesson.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Marcia thinks that a girl who is suddenly interested in Greg is actually using him so that Greg will vote for her as head cheerleader--over Marcia.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Peter tries out for the role of George Washington in a school play, but gets the role of Benedict Arnold instead. But he then wants to quit the play altogether when his classmates start branding him as a "traitor."

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Marcia has a crush on her new dentist, which only intensifies when she mistakes an opportunity to babysit for him as a date with him to the ballet.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Bobby doesn't want to be safety monitor for his class because his classmates now hate him. However, he soon abuses his power and begins reporting on his family when they break house rules. Meanwhile, the family salvages an old sailboat.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Bobby becomes obsessed with Jesse James. Mike and Carol don't approve of his new hero, and try to find a way to convince him that James was nothing but a "mean, dirty killer."

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Marcia breaks a date with Charlie when "big man on campus" Doug Simpson asks her out. However, after she gets hit in the nose with a football, Doug Simpson breaks his date with her.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Peter gets a job at the bike shop, but he is fired after three days. He doesn't want to tell his parents the bad news, because he told the family he might be getting a promotion to salesman the day he got fired.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Cindy loses her mom's earrings after playing with them, and "detective" Peter Brady tries to solve the mystery. But when Carol wants the earrings for a costume ball and they're still not found, the entire family tries to crack the case.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: The Brady girls try to play matchmaker between Carol's free-spirited grandmother and stick-in-the-mud Grandpa Brady.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch

programme.desc: Bobby lies to his friends that he knows Joe Namath, but they don't believe him. So with Cindy's help, Bobby fakes a serious illness in order to get Namath to come to the house and visit him.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Greg gets Peter to pretend to be an older guy and go with him on a double date, and Mike and Carol prepare to entertain one of Mike's clients from Mexico.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Greg steals the mascot from his rival school the night before the big game, and Mike tries to help him return it before he gets in big trouble.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Marcia, Jan and Peter each get jobs at the local ice cream parlor, each with varying results.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: The rival school's quarterback suddenly takes an interest in Marcia the week of the football game., and Mike is Jealous when Carol's high school sweetheart comes for a visit.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Jan thinks she' has no talent after not being chosen for a ballet recital, so the family tries to make her feel better and help her find a skill.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: A series of misunderstandings lead the Bradys to believe that Alice and Sam are up to much more than just bowling on their upcoming Saturday night date.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Jan makes a bunch of promises to be elected "Most Popular Girl" in her class, but backs out of them after she wins the election. Meanwhile, Mike and Carol try to make plans for their second honeymoon.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: A couple Mike and Carol know adopt a young boy, but the boy soon misses his two best friends--one African-American, one Asian-American. As a result, the couple decides to adopt all three boys.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Marcia battles nerves and Greg's sexist remarks when she tries to get her driver's license. Eventually, the debate over which gender has the better driving abilities leads to a winner-take-all driving test in a vacant parking lot.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Peter and Bobby believe they are seeing a UFO, which actually is part of an elaborate hoax being played by Greg. The trick backfires though when Peter and Bobby take pictures, which lead to a government investigation.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: There's never a good reason for murder, but some killers are particularly brutal—choosing their prey at random or with no apparent motive and then cunningly covering their tracks. Even so, telltale clues remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Years after a murder has been committed, investigators use advanced DNA analysis to shed new light on crimes that have gone unpunished for far too long.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: New Forensic Techniques used to Solve Old Cases: Advancement in science and technology are encouraging people to revisit the past in hopes of answering questions that have remained unanswered, and solving crimes that seemed unsolvable.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In San Diego, California, a killer has left behind pieces of evidence. Detectives must sort through these small clues to prove murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people murder for love. But these killers did it for the money. When greed is the motive, investigators must make every clue pay off.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A killer may strike in the middle of the night, and hide clues well. But the police are always there, ready and working, and they will never give up when they're on the trail of criminals who decide it's Killing Time.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Identifying Burned Remains: It's difficult to have a murder investigation without a body, and burning up the victim is a time-honored method of destroying physical evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes the scales of justice are balanced by just a few milligrams of evidence – a couple of fibers, a tooth filling, or a smudge on a piece of tape. The biggest cases are often solved by the smallest clues.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Photography has long been a vital tool in homicide investigations. A single image captures enough information to identify a suspect, and to preserve a vital clue long after a witness' memory fades.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: No matter how chaotic or how clean a crime scene appears to be, the culprit is bound to leave something telling behind. Occasionally, it's nothing more than a fingerprint or shoe tread. Sometimes that's all that's needed.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic Botany & Geology: Plants help provide oxygen and nutrients for existence. Soil is the fertilizer of life. Yet both can yield clues to the time and location of a person's death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When murder becomes a family affair, investigators must turn to forensics to uncover family plots.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: DNA Analysis: With the advent of DNA analysis, just a few microscopic cells found at a crime scene can be used to put a murder behind bars.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Men don't have a monopoly on murder, but it's still extraordinary when women kill. Though female killers are as deadly as males, they choose less violent methods.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark gets caught on a mountain ledge, a young outlaw risks his life to rescue him and breaks his leg doing so.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The notorious Shelton rides into the town of North Fork to take revenge on an elderly Marshal who is now crippled and working for Lucas McCain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Johnny Gibbs, Lucas McCain's brother-in-law, visits the McCain ranch. Gibbs, a rodeo rider wanted by the law, begins stirring up trouble.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A vengeful judge who believes Lucas was responsible for his son's death, kidnaps Mark McCain to revenge himself on Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A handsome Italian count arrives in North Fork. The town bully ridicules his manner of speech and dress and provokes the Count to challenge him to a duel.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A new bank opens and Banker Hamilton hires a slow-witted gunman to guard the safe. When some of the gunman's old outlaw friends arrive in town they propose he join them in robbing the bank.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark tries to play Cupid between Lucas and a stranger who arrives in North Fork, the girl's older brothers accuse him of trifling with her affections and challenge him to fight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An arch-criminal has been run out of New Orleans and is passing through North Fork. Spotting the McCain ranch, he tells McCain he wants to buy it.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Dan Willard takes on Marshal Micah Torrence's job. With no experience, he takes a tough stand with a bunch of Texas cowhands whose high spirits are evident at the saloon.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark are returning from a big cattle sale when the stage is robbed by three outlaws. Lucas, desperate to recover the money that was stolen, is determined to pursue the outlaws.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas gets in trouble when he accuses the foreman of a neighboring ranch of rustling some of his cattle.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An Argentine family moves to North Fork. The townspeople are unfriendly to them, making fun of their clothing and customs. The Argentinean adult immigrant is openly hostile in return.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark find themselves exposed to anthrax after they adopt a stray horse whose owner has been killed in a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After the end of the Civil War, General Phil Sheridan, who has been appointed Governor of the New Mexico Territory, is on an inspection tour of the country.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A famous gunfighter marries and decides to retire. He and his wife settle down in North Fork and open a store, but three outlaws arrive in town looking to best him in a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An old friend of Lucas McCain's, a traveling photographer, comes to North Fork plying his trade. When a murder is committed, the photographer is accused of the crime.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The townsfolk of North Fork decide to give a young couple a shivaree celebration. When the drunken crowd gets out of hand and roughs up the bride-to-be, the young groom challenges them.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a young boy from Brooklyn is accused of murder, Mark, believing the boy's claim of innocence, hides him until he can find the real killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: U.S. Marshal Sam Buckhart arrives in North Fork in search of renegade Indians suspected of the brutal killing of a Texas Ranger and his family.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Sid Fallon tries to blackmail former gambler Julia Andueza into allowing him to use her boarding house as a gambling hall and saloon.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas puts his life in jeopardy when he agrees to testify in a murder case where the first witness was killed before he could testify, and the killer is still at large.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Outlaw Sam Morley falls in love with a young woman who has a serious illness and asks Lucas to turn him in for the reward and use the money to pay for her medical care.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas welcomes his old friend Tom Birch, who once saved his life, unaware that the man is now a bank robber on the run with his gang.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Dan Maury, released from Yuma prison, arrives in North Fork intent on getting even with Marshal Torrance, who helped send him to jail.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Mark McCain is eager to help lawman Jay Jefferson, who has arrived in North Fork intent on killing an outlaw for the reward, whether he is the right man or not.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas comes to the rescue when escaped convicts hold up the general store in North Fork and take Marshall Torrance hostage.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Mark manages to capture a hawk but falls into danger with a rattlesnake. A stranger comes to his rescue and Mark invites the man home, unaware that he is on the run from the law.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man travels back in time to try to prevent some of history's catastrophes.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An astronaut arrives back on Earth, then notices things have changed in his absence.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man considers several possibilities when offered one wish by a genie.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The curator of a murderers' row in a soon-to-be-defunct wax museum persuades the owner to let him keep the figures for awhile.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A bored, wealthy businessman gets a chance to go back in time and start over, armed with all the knowledge he's acquired.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Toy designer Horace Ford spends most of his time reminiscing about his idyllic childhood. But when he gets a chance to go back to those years he gets a bitter taste of reality.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man named Benteen leads a colony of Americans stranded on a desert planet for 30 years.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A young couple book passage on a trans-Atlantic cruise, hoping to salvage their marriage.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An untalented would-be writer's career takes off when the ghost of William Shakespeare writes his script.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An alcoholic bookie regrets that he wasn't a better father to his son, Pip, critically wounded in South Vietnam. A visit to an amusement park gives them both a second chance.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Boxing robot "Battling Maxo" breaks down before the scheduled bout, forcing his manager to take its place.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Mr. Wilson believes he sees a gremlin on the wing of the commercial aircraft he is taking back home... from the sanitarium, where he has been committed for six months after a mental breakdown during a similar flight.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Patrick Thomas McNulty, a long-winded and self-absorbed know-it-all, is given a fantastic device which brings literal meaning to the expression "stop the world; I want to get off."

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A dejected jockey wants to be tall.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Erich is displeased when his wife buys an expensive doll for his step-daughter. He becomes even more displeased when the doll tells him it doesn't like him!

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie returns, to the dismay of Negan; the trials she endured since leaving have made her harder in order for her and her son to survive; Daryl and Maggie unexpectedly fight an unseen and unknown threat.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl and Carol find an old cabin that takes Daryl back to his years away from the group after Rick disappeared; he relives the painful memory of meeting a reticent survivor and the toxic events that amplified his relationship with Dog.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: With Maggie's map, Gabriel and Aaron search for food and supplies to bring back to Alexandria; checking out one more location, they chance upon a stash; faith is broken and optimism is fragmented when they are put to the ultimate test.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Eugene, Ezekiel, Yumiko, and Princess are captured and separated by the mysterious troopers that surrounded them at the rail yard; claustrophobic with mounting anxiety, Princess struggles with memories of her traumatic past and plans to escape.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: At the lowest point in their friendship, Daryl and Carol come to a fork in the road and head their separate ways; Carol returns to Alexandria, while Daryl stays on the road, each going into their own type of survival mode.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: With Maggie back at Alexandria, Carol takes Negan on a journey to minimize the increasing tension; here, Negan reflects on his late wife, Lucille, and the events that led him to this point.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie, Gabriel y Aarón buscan comida y suministros para llevarlos de regreso a Alejandría, utilizando el mapa de Maggie. En su búsqueda de una ubicación más, encuentran un escondite, pero la fe se rompe y el optimismo se resquebraja.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Eugene, Ezekiel, Yumiko y Princess son capturados y separados por los misteriosos soldados que los rodeaban en la estación ferroviaria. Princess lucha con los recuerdos de su traumático pasado y planea escapar.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl y Carol toman caminos separados. Ella regresa a Alejandría, mientras él se adentra en los bosques. A partir de este momento, cada uno deberá usar sus habilidades de supervivencia.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie vuelve a Alejandría mientras Carol lleva a Negan a un viaje para minimizar la tensión en aumento. Negan reflexiona sobre su difunta esposa Lucille.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie regresa, para consternación de Negan. Los desafíos que superó desde su partida han hecho que se vuelva difícil sobrevivir para ella y su hijo. Por otro lado, Daryl y Maggie luchan inesperadamente contra una amenaza invisible y desconocida.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl y Carol encuentran una vieja cabaña que provoca que Daryl recuerde sus años alejados del grupo después de que Rick desapareció. Además, revive el doloroso recuerdo de encontrarse con un sobreviviente y los eventos tóxicos con Dog.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent West is kidnapped by a madman who plans to create an underwater kingdom that will control the world's shipping lanes.

programme.desc: The evil, diminutive Dr. Loveless impoverishes an Indian tribe so that he can become their benefactor -- and their god.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon fail to save the life of a highly unpopular Latin American dictator they have been assigned to guard.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agent Gordon has a vivid nightmare about a prisoner's mother's ghost who attempts to clear the name of her son, imprisoned 35 years.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents West and Gordon tangle with an ex-confederate colonel who possesses the power to control the fourth dimension.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon are assigned to guard a member of an investment group set up so the surviving member will gain all the assets.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents West and Gordon encounter an old adversary who has found the secret of turning objects into gold.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: The receipt of a newspaper that predicts the death, in their presence, of a famed magician, puzzles agents West and Gordon.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon encounter a society lady who plans to change the U.S.A. into a monarchy and reign as its queen.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon become involved in a bizarre Siberian prisoner exchange in Vladivostok without leaving the United States.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon investigate the murder of a scientist who had been studying a rash of destructive tidal waves.

programme.desc: The agents investigate the unexplained crash of a commercial airliner.

programme.desc: Passengers aboard a plane are sacrificed in pursuit of alien technology.

programme.desc: The father of babies born with vestigial tails is a chameleon-like man.

programme.desc: The agents investigate when several people disappear in a remote region of Florida.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Mauro teaches a homeowner how to paint a metal door; Mark explains how to match mortar for repointing jobs; Tom teaches Austin how to make different wood joints by building simple utility boxes.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom installs an alternative to a traditional gutter; Ross and Richard update Kevin on a Future House technology; Jenn heads to Phoenix to recreate the desert in a homeowner’s front yard.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Mauro travels to Sacramento to show a homeowner the safe way to strip paint; Tom explains basic chiseling techniques; Richard helps a special homeowner hook up her refrigerator with an ice maker.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Mark teaches apprentice Krysten how to reface a granite fireplace; Jenn gives tips on starting an organic garden; Richard helps a homeowner replace her kitchen faucet which has a broken shutoff valve.

programme.title: Ask This Old House

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Ross visits a community that plans to have all net-zero energy housing; Richard demonstrates the uses of less common wrenches; Tom and Kevin build a console table using a maple slab with a live edge.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: All work no play makes Jack an angry boy when Janet hires him to work for her and acts like a tough boss.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: When Jack, Chrissy, and Janet set out for a gourmet dinner for the Ropers - designed to stave off an expected rent hike - the " meanest" sailor from Jack's navy days arrives and wrecks the evening.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack is in a panic - and in the doghouse with Chrissy and Janet - when a young pregnant woman arrives at the house and names him as the father.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack, Chrissy, and Janet find out how far Mr. Roper's garden has gone to pot when they find some unusual plants while weeding it.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: An unexpected visit from Chrissy's father, the minister, throws the kids into a panic. Jack decides to move out temporarily but Reverend Snow arrives before Jack can leave. Fumbling for an explanation, Janet blurts out that she and Jack are married.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Chrissy offer to baby-sit for Stanley Roper's parakeet in exchange for a couple of concert tickets.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: A surprise birthday party for Jack is nearly spoiled when an old girlfriend turns up, ready to entice Jack back into her web. Guest Star(s): Loni Anderson

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack lies to his girlfriend in order to keep a date with his new romantic interest.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The women in Jack's life go to a nude beach protest and run into trouble with the cops.

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Curtis Strong
programme.desc: On February 6th, 1993 Oscar De La Hoya and Curtis Strong fought at the Sports Arena in San Diego, Ca. in a 6 round bout that lasted 4 rounds ending in a technical knockout victory for De La Hoya.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Felix Sturm
programme.desc: On June 5th, 2004 Oscar De La Hoya fought Felix Sturm at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas for the WBO Middleweight title in a 12 round bout resulting in an unanimous decision win for De La Hoya.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Fernado Vargas
programme.desc: On September 14th, 2002, Oscar De La Hoya and Fernando Vargas fought for Super Welterweight titles at the Mandalay Bay in Las Vegas. In an incredible battle, De La Hoya was able to stop Vargas in the 11th round.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Giorgio Campanella
programme.desc: On May 27th, 1994 Oscar De La hoya fought Giorgio Campanella at the MGM Grand Garden Arena in Las Vegas for the WBO World Super Featherweight title with De La Hoya knocking out Campanella in the thrid round securing his victory.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Hector Camacho
programme.desc: On September 13th, 1997 Oscar De La Hoya fought Hector Camacho for the WBC World Welterweight title at the Thomas and Mack Center in Las Vegas the twelve round bout ended in a unanimous decision victory for De La Hoya.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Jeff Mayweather
programme.desc: On March 13th, 1993 Oscar De La Hoya and Jeff Mayweather faced eachother at the Hilton Hotel in Las Vegas in an 8 round bout then ended by technical knockout in the fourth round securing the victory for De la Hoya.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs John John Molina
programme.desc: On February 18th, 1995 Oscar De La Hoya fought John John Molina for the WBO World Lightweight title at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a 12 round bout resulting in a win for De La Hoya.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Julio Cesar Chavez 1
programme.desc: On June 7th, 1996 Oscar De La Hoya and Julio Cesar Chavez fought for the first time for WBC World super Lightweight titles at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas that ended by technical knockout in the fourth round giving the win to De La Hoya.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Luis Ramon Campas
programme.desc: On May 3rd, 2003 Oscar De La Hoya faced Luis Ramon Campas for WBA and WBC World super welterweight title at the Mandalay Bay Resort in Las Vegas the ended by technical knockout in the 7th round with De La Hoya securing the victory.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Pernell Whitaker
programme.desc: On April 12th, 1997, Oscar De La Hoya fought Pernell Whitaker for the WBC Welterweight Title at Thomas & Mack Center in Las Vegas. De La Hoya won by a very controversial decision in a fight that many thought Whitaker had the superior performance.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Rafael Ruelas
programme.desc: On May 6th, 1995 Oscar De La Hoya fought Rafael Ruelas for IBF and WBO World Lightweight titles at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas. The 12 round bout only went two rounds ending in technical knockout favoring De La Hoya.

programme.title: Oscar Valdez vs Miguel Berchelt
programme.desc: On February 20th, 2021 Oscar Valdez and Miguel Berchelt faced eachother for the WBC World Super Featherweight title during "The Bubble" at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas with Berchelt going down three times Valdez scared the win in the 10th round.

programme.title: Oscar Valdez vs Scott Quigg
programme.desc: On March 10th, 2018, Oscar Valdez and Scott Quigg fought for the WBO World Featherweight Championship in Carson, CA. Oscar Valdez defeated Scott Quigg by unanimous decision in a thrilling fight, showcasing his superior skills and resilience.

programme.title: Paulie Ayala vs Johnny Tapia 1
programme.desc: On June 26th, 1999, Paulie Ayala fought Johnny Tapia for the WBA Bantamweight Title at the Mandalay Bay in Las Vegas. In what was the 1999 Ring Magazine Fight of the Year, the two men put on a show that ended with an Ayala unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Randall Bailey vs Mike Jones
programme.desc: On June 9th, 2012 Randall Bailey and Mike Jones fought for vacant IBF World welterweight titles at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas that ended in the 11th round by knockout resulting in a victory for Bailey.

programme.title: Ray Mancini vs Arturo Frias
programme.desc: On May 8th, 1982 Ray Mancini and Arturo Frias fought for the WBA World Lightweight title at the Aladdin in Las Vegas with what was supposed to be a 15 round bout ending in the first by technical knockout securing the victory for Ray Mancini.
